title: juncus effusus var. fistulosus
intro: Juncus effusus var. fistulosus, also known as hollow-stemmed rush or jointed rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Juncaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of inulin, a prebiotic fiber that has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus effusus var. fistulosus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
